notableEvents.label: Blake Dunn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Blake Dunn grounds into a double play, pitcher David Peterson to catcher Luis Torrens to first baseman Jared Young. JJ Bleday out at home. Tyler Stephenson to 3rd. Matt McLain to 2nd. Blake Dunn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Blake Dunn rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Blake Dunn grounds into a double play, pitcher David Peterson to catcher Luis Torrens to first baseman Jared Young. JJ Bleday out at home. Tyler Stephenson to 3rd. Matt McLain to 2nd. Blake Dunn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder MJ Melendez. JJ Bleday scores. Tyler Stephenson to 3rd. Tyler Stephenson advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder MJ Melendez. JJ Bleday scores. Tyler Stephenson to 3rd. Tyler Stephenson advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Bo Bichette.
